description: The HR department has reported duplicate entries for employee 'Sarah Jones' in the Lobby Track host database. One record contains her email ('s.jones@example.com') but no phone, while the other contains her phone extension ('555-0199') but no email. Consolidate these into a single record for 'Sarah Jones' containing both the email and phone number, and remove the redundant entry. Save a screenshot of the final search result showing the single complete record to /home/ga/consolidated_host_result.png.
